business_ideas.idea: Self-driving wallets: AI auto-optimizes money to correct accounts instantly based on financial goals
Daily or hourly payment streams instead of bi-weekly; get paid as you work continuously
Credit card upsells for food delivery; dessert or drinks add-on across all restaurant orders

predictions.text: Remote work will become permanent; 40 million American jobs may not return post-COVID
America's wallet infrastructure needs modernization; money movement and payments will be next disruption
Streaming payment model will eventually replace traditional bi-weekly payroll system
